title: polemonium occidentale subsp. typicum
intro: Polemonium occidentale subsp. typicum, also known as Western Sky Pilot, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Western Sky Pilot include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from sore throats and coughs. Western Sky Pilot is traditionally prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations are also used in the form of tinctures and salves.
